reviews.comment:
Tiene baños limpios y la cafetería tiene productos frescos y de buena calidad. No se entiende porqué no aceptan pago con la app YPF.

(Translated by Google)
It has clean bathrooms and the cafeteria has fresh, high-quality products. It's hard to understand why they don't accept payment with the YPF app.
